Deaths Page

DBZ Characters Deaths

|Piccolo|

Piccolo:
When: During the Vegeta and Nappa Saga
How: Nappa throws a giant fireball at Gohan and Piccolo steps in and takes the damage.
Who did it: Nappa
Yamcha:
When: During the Vegeta and Nappa Saga
How: A Sabi-man preforms a brutal kamikaze attack.
Who did it:A Sabi-man
Krillin:
When: During the Freiza Saga
How:Freiza lifts up him and makes him explode
Who did it:Freza
Goku:
When: During the Raditz Saga
How:Piccolo fires special beam cannon and it goes through both Raditz and Goku
Who did it:Piccolo
